query: 你是CiviBBS测试岗。对 delete_directory 插件跑触发机验证。插件目录：/mnt/c/civibbs/pipeline/workspace_test/delete_directory/ 。读取 definition.yaml 了解输入输出，读取 triggers/*.yaml 了解触发条件。用 python 执行 execute.py 的 execute() 函数模拟每个触发场景。触发机：normal(删除空目录), not_found(目录不存在且missing_ok=false), not_empty(目录非空且recursive=false)。把测试报告写到 /mnt/c/civibbs/pipeline/workspace_test/delete_directory/test_report.md
